name: continuous-improvement
description: Beginner mode: see what your agent learned, list its instincts, and request a session reflection. Bundles four grounding skills (gateguard, para-memory-files, tdd-workflow, verification-loop) so research, memory, tests, and verification happen by default — every edit starts from facts, not guesses.

tools.name: ci_status
tools.what: See what the system has learned about your project

tools.name: ci_instincts
tools.what: List all learned behaviors with confidence levels

tools.name: ci_reflect
tools.what: Reflect on what you did this session

tools.name: ci_gateguard_clear
tools.what: Clear the GateGuard gate for files after presenting facts

hooks.description: Silently captures every tool call as observations and routes prompts to the matching skill via the route table. Lightweight and non-blocking.
